title.en: The Dragon River Realm Lord was a little unconv...

content.en:
"Confident in practicing into a black fog multi-dimensional ???"

The Dragon River Realm Lord was a little unconvinced.

Since the Red Wolf Family obtained the inheritance of the Black Mist Multi-Dimensional Body, there have been many second and third realms that have cultivated the Black Mist Multi-Dimensional Body, but for countless years, there has only been one person who has cultivated the Black Mist Multi-Dimensional Body, and it is only a preliminary entry, and there are huge sequelae.

After that, the clansmen were no longer allowed to cultivate.

It can be said that such a mutilated Black Mist Multidimensional Inheritance, even if it is practiced and its combat effectiveness is very strong, but the sequelae are too great, so it is not worth spending a huge amount of money on cultivation.

It was precisely because of this that the Red Wolf Family revealed its willingness to trade the Black Mist Multidimensional Inheritance.

"Investigate this Mingze Realm Lord!"

The Dragon Wolf Realm Lord ordered.

Even if the opponent's doppelganger blew itself up, as long as the body is found, then you can still snatch the opponent's multi-dimensional treasure bottle imitation.

"Yes, Ancestor!"

The Lord of the Dragon River Realm answered.

Soon, a lot of information from the Ming Ze Realm Lord was sent to the Red Wolf Family.

What made the Red Wolf Family strange was that the Mingze Realm Lord did not escape.

For the first time, the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord went to arrest the Mingze Realm Lord.

......

The boundary of the sea ruins.

The Ming Ze Realm Lord is here at the moment trading with an extradimensional realm, he is selling the information of the black mist multidimensional body, and the transaction has just been completed.

Just as he was about to leave, an aura of terror locked on him, making him unable to move.

"Mingze Realm Lord, you are really bold!"

The Dragon Wolf Realm Lord appeared in front of the Mingze Realm Lord and said coldly.

At the beginning, he even had some doubts about the authenticity of the Mingze Realm Lord, it was possible that it was counterfeited by other extradimensional realms, but at this moment, seeing the real Mingze Realm Lord, his breath and will were exactly the same, and he must not be faked.

"You are ......"

The Mingze Realm Lord was terrified and hurriedly asked.

This terrifying aura was much more terrifying than any third realm he had ever seen, and he didn't remember that he had offended such a strong man!

"Mingze Realm Lord, what are you still pretending, I'm the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord, haven't we just met~?"

The Dragon Wolf Realm Lord said coldly.

"Dragon Wolf Realm Master !!!"

The Ming Ze Realm Lord finally knew the identity of the other party, which was the fourth realm extradimensional realm existence of the Red Wolf Family.

But he just sold the information that the Red Wolf Family had a black mist multidimensional body and was willing to sell it, could it be that this also offended the Red Wolf Family, but it would not make the Red Wolf Family dispatch the only Fourth Realm!

How could he be the master of the Mingze Realm with this qualification!

"Senior of the Dragon Wolf Realm, I just sold some information, and I didn't offend the Red Wolf Family!"

The Ming Ze Realm Lord looked extremely frightened, for fear that the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord would wipe him out with one thought.

At this moment, the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord frowned.

This Ming Ze Realm Lord's reaction really made him wonder if he had made a mistake.

But the breath is exactly the same, and so is the soul will!

Immediately, he deduced it.

This deduction was suddenly calculated, and the Mingze Realm Lord had not been to their Red Wolf Family.

"Tricked!"

The Dragon Wolf Realm Lord was furious.

He finally knew that the Mingze Realm Lord who went to the Red Wolf Family was fake, and he was deliberately disguised as the Mingze Realm Lord, no wonder he dared to be so arrogant.

And he hasn't seen through it yet.

Immediately, he tried to calculate the Mingze Realm Lord, but found that he couldn't calculate anything.

Even if the other party really falls, he should be able to deduce something, but now he can't deduce anything, which can only prove that the other party has not fallen, and he still has the ability to cover up the traces of deduction.

The Dragon Wolf Realm Lord didn't kill the Ming Ze Realm Lord, and there was no point in killing the other party, the other party must not be a friend of the Ming Ze Realm Lord, otherwise he wouldn't have been pitted.

Wow!

Seeing this, the Lord of Mingze Realm breathed a sigh of relief.

"It's horrible!"

He didn't know what was going on, but he didn't dare to do it anymore when he continued to sell the information of the Red Wolf Family.

Immediately, he immediately left here, for fear that the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord would regret it.

Moreover, he is far away from the territory of 5000 and will not return anytime soon. []

An existence of the Fourth Realm, even if he is backed by his backer, he is far from being offended, so he can only choose to avoid it.

And the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord, who returned to the Red Wolf Family, contacted an old friend, borrowed a super-dimensional Daoist soldier with deduction ability, and then paid a certain price to deduce.

However, it still can't be deduced.

"Damn, it must be the fourth realm at the same level as me, if you are the fourth realm, trade the black mist multidimensional body with me, I can still refuse, deliberately tease me, it's really shameless!" said the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord angrily.

He wasn't going to investigate, because he couldn't do it.

As for the loss this time, it is actually not a loss, it is just the loss of a black mist multidimensional inheritance, but such a inheritance can be made many times.

......

The other side.

Ye Tian was in a good mood.

This time, after obtaining the Black Mist Multidimensional Body Inheritance, he only lost more than three hundred drops of Multidimensional Essence.

However, the degree of inheritance of the Black Mist Multidimensional Body is too great, and the cultivation difficulty is very high, without a certain understanding, it is impossible to comprehend the Black Mist Multidimensional Body at all, let alone practice it.

Moreover, the Black Mist Multidimensional Body also has cultivation requirements.

If you want to cultivate the Black Mist Multidimensional Body, you must comprehend the extradimensional rules above one point, which is the most basic requirement.

And this black mist multi-dimensional body is very badly damaged, and once the cultivation fails, it will cause very serious damage to the super-dimensional body and the super-dimensional Dao species.

What's more, even if you practice it, it will cause damage all the time, and you need something special to suppress this situation.

"'~ It's a very chicken black fog multi-dimensional, but for me, as long as I can enter the black fog stone statue area. "

Ye Tian first comprehended the cultivation method of the black mist multi-dimensional body, and after the comprehension was analyzed to a certain extent, he entered the black mist realm and absorbed the black mist energy.

The years passed.

Time passed slowly.

Ye Tian used the Yutian Lotus Platform to constantly analyze the cultivation method of the black mist multi-dimensional body, but this black mist multi-dimensional body was too mysterious and complicated (Zhao Zhao), and it was not an ordinary secret technique.

After more than a dozen extradimensional epochs had passed, Ye Tiancai had truly and initially comprehended the cultivation method of the Black Mist Multidimensional Body.

"It's too difficult, with my current ability, plus Yutian Lotus Terrace, it's just a preliminary understanding, but it can't be perfected at all. "

Ye Tian is not ready to perfect, so he will directly cultivate like this.

......

Black Mist Realm.

Ye Tian came to the black mist area of the black mist stone statue, and did not enter it, once he entered, he would be killed in an instant, so he absorbed the black mist energy nearby.

"Absorb a wisp of black mist energy first!"

Ye Tian used the cultivation method of the Black Mist Multi-Dimensional Body, and quickly absorbed a wisp of incomparably pure black mist energy.

Rumble!!!!!

His physical body seemed to collapse, but under the effect of the cultivation method of the black mist multi-dimensional body, he gradually refined this wisp of black mist energy.

After a long time, he really refined this wisp of black mist energy.
